## Problem

<!-- What can't you do today?  Concrete use case is better than
     abstract API request. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Sketch of the API, behaviour, or change.  Pseudo-code OK. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Pure Rust core
- [ ] Python binding
- [ ] Bridge (`crates/mmbus-bridge`)
- [ ] WAL
- [ ] CI / packaging
- [ ] Other:

## Impact

- Breaking change?  (Wire format?  Public API?)
- Performance budget?  (Acceptable overhead on the publish path?)
- Platform constraints?  (Linux-only?  POSIX-specific?  Windows?)
